section.heading: Abolition of United States Arms Control and Disarmament Agency

content.p: The United States Arms Control and Disarmament Agency is abolished.

section.sourceCredit: (Pub. L. 105–277, div. G, subdiv. A, title XII, § 1211, Oct. 21, 1998, 112 Stat. 2681–767.)

note.heading: Effective Date
note.p:
Pub. L. 105–277, div. G, subdiv. A, title XII, § 1201, Oct. 21, 1998, 112 Stat. 2681–767, provided that: “This title [see Tables for classification], and the amendments made by this title, shall take effect on the earlier of— “(1) April 1, 1999; or
“(2) the date of abolition [Apr. 1, 1999] of the United States Arms Control and Disarmament Agency pursuant to the reorganization plan described in section 1601 [22 U.S.C. 6601].”
